data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Follow-up appointment scheduling', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement has been met. While the linked use case mentions the need for follow-up appointment scheduling, there is no evidence provided that indicates such an appointment has been scheduled or confirmed. This constitutes a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the expected result was not achieved.
gaps: No evidence of a follow-up appointment being scheduled or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
